subject: fix(web): resolve React hydration mismatch error #418
body:
Browser APIs (window.matchMedia, navigator.onLine, window.__pwaPromptReceived)
were being called at module scope or during render, producing different values
on server vs client and triggering React error #418 on hydration.

Changes:
- usePWAInstall: Convert module-level `isStandalone` constant to
  `checkIsStandalone()` function, called only inside useEffect
- usePWAInstall: Move `getPromptWasReceived()` from render-time call
  to useEffect-managed state
- useOnlineStatus: Default to `true` (SSR-safe) and sync actual
  navigator.onLine value in useEffect

Tags: hydration, pwa, web, bugfix
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa
Semver: patch
